memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas Wood
memoryArtifacts.description:
There's information on Thomas and his Wood ancestors in "Little Compton Families, Vol. 2"  by Benjamin Wilbour, Little Compton, RI, Self, 1974, pp 778-781, and from Austin's Gen. Dictionary of RI.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wood於大約1666年出生在美國羅得島紐波特波斯姆斯時，他的父親John Wood48歲，母親Mary Peabody27歲。他於1690年與Content Thurston在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1729年5月10日在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wood于大约1666年出生在美国罗德岛州紐波特波斯姆斯时，他的父亲John Wood48岁，母亲Mary Peabody27岁。他于1690年与Content Thurston在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1729年5月10日在美国罗德岛州紐波特蕾托 康普頓享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wood was born about 1666, in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, United States, his father, John Wood, was 48 and his mother, Mary Peabody, was 27. He married Content Thurston in 1690, in Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 10 May 1729, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wood est né environ 1666, à Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis, son père, John Wood, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mary Peabody, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Content Thurston en 1690, à Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1729, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Wood um 1666 in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wood 48 und seine Mutter Mary Peabody 27. Er hat 1690 in Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Content Thurston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Mai 1729 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wood è nato il circa 1666 nel Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, John Wood, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Mary Peabody, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Content Thurston nel 1690, nel Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1729, nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, B: イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトリットル コンプトン

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Woodが約1666年にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトポルトスモウスで生まれた時，父John Woodは48歳，母Mary Peabodyは27歳であった。1690年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルリットル コンプトンでContent Thurstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1729年5月10日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトリットル コンプトンで64歳で死去した。

ko.Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, U: 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 미들레타운
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wood(이)가 대략 1666년 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 포츠모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wood(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Peabody(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1690년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴에서 Content Thurston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1729년 5월 10일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wood nasceu aproximadamente 1666, em Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Wood, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mary Peabody, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Content Thurston em 1690, em Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1729, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wood родился около 1666 г. в местности порцмоут, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Wood было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Peabody, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Content Thurston в 1690 г. в местности литл комптон, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 мая 1729 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Wood nació aproximadamente 1666, en Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Wood, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mary Peabody, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Content Thurston en 1690, en Little Compton, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1729, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 64 años.
